book.modpack.guide.geology.andesite.name: Andesite
book.modpack.guide.geology.andesite.page:
**Andesite** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Volcanic Regions**.
\
\
It can be used for **Rock Anvils**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.argillite.pag:
**Argillite** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
- Deep, deep underground.
book.modpack.guide.geology.arkose.name: Arkose
**Arkose** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.basalt.name: Basalt
**Basalt** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Volcanic Regions**.
\
\
It can be used for **Rock Anvils**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.blackslag.pag:
**Blackslag** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- Near the bottom of the world.
- Deep, deep underground.
\
It's formation is a mystery as of now.
book.modpack.guide.geology.blueschist.pa:
**Blueschist** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Volcanic Regions**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
book.modpack.guide.geology.breccia.name: Breccia
book.modpack.guide.geology.breccia.page1:
**Breccia** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.chalk.name: Chalk
book.modpack.guide.geology.chalk.page1.t:
**Chalk** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.chert.name: Chert
book.modpack.guide.geology.chert.page1.t:
**Chert** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.claystone.pag:
**Claystone** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
**Conglomerate** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.dacite.name: Dacite
**Dacite** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Volcanic Regions**.
\
\
It can be used for **Rock Anvils**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.diorite.name: Diorite
book.modpack.guide.geology.diorite.page1:
**Diorite** is a **Igneous Intrusive** rock.  It can be found:
- In **Uplift Regions**.
- Deep in **Land Regions**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
\
\
It can be used for **Rock Anvils**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.dolomite.name: Dolomite
book.modpack.guide.geology.dolomite.page:
**Dolomite** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.gabbro.name: Gabbro
**Gabbro** is a **Mafic** **Igneous Intrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Uplift Regions**.
- Deep in **Land Regions**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
\
\
It can be used for **Rock Anvils**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.gneiss.name: Gneiss
**Gneiss** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions** under **Peridotite**, **Serpentine**, and **Blueschist**.
- Under **Phyllite** or **Slate**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
book.modpack.guide.geology.granite.name: Granite
book.modpack.guide.geology.granite.page1:
**Granite** is a **Felsic** **Igneous Intrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Uplift Regions**.
- Deep in **Land Regions**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
\
\
It can be used for **Rock Anvils**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.komatiite.pag:
**Komatiite** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Volcanic Regions**.
- In **Land Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.limestone.pag:
**Limestone** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.marble.name: Marble
**Marble** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- In **Uplift Regions**.
- Under **Chalk**, **Dolomite** or **Limestone**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.name: Geology
book.modpack.guide.geology.nephelinite.p:
**Nephelinite** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- Deep, deep underground.
book.modpack.guide.geology.peridotite.pa:
**Peridotite** is a Mafic **Igneous Intrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
book.modpack.guide.geology.phonolite.pag:
**Phonolite** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.phyllite.name: Phyllite
book.modpack.guide.geology.phyllite.page:
**Phyllite** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- Under **Sedimentary** rocks like **Claystone**, **Conglomerate**, **Shale**, **Argillite**, **Breccia**, and **Travertine**.
- In **Uplift Regions** under **Diorite**, **Granite**, **Gabbro**.
- In **Land Regions** under **Komatiite** and **Phonolite**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.picrite_basal:
**Picrite Basalt** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- Deep, deep underground.
book.modpack.guide.geology.quartzite.pag:
**Quartzite** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- In **Uplift Regions**.
- Under **Chert**, **Sandstone**, **Red Sandstone** or **Arkose**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.red_sandstone:
**Red Sandstone** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.rhyolite.name: Rhyolite
book.modpack.guide.geology.rhyolite.page:
**Rhyolite** is a **Igneous Extrusive** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Volcanic Regions**.
\
\
It can be used for **Rock Anvils**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.sandstone.pag:
**Sandstone** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.schist.name: Schist
**Schist** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions** under **Peridotite**, **Serpentine**, and **Blueschist**.
- Under **Phyllite** or **Slate**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
book.modpack.guide.geology.serpentine.pa:
**Serpentine** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- Near the bottom of the world.
book.modpack.guide.geology.shale.name: Shale
book.modpack.guide.geology.shale.page1.t:
**Shale** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.slate.name: Slate
book.modpack.guide.geology.slate.page1.t:
**Slate** is a **Metamorphic** rock. It can be found:
- Under **Sedimentary** rocks like **Claystone**, **Conglomerate**, **Shale**, **Argillite**, **Breccia**, and **Travertine**.
- In **Uplift Regions** under **Diorite**, **Granite**, **Gabbro**.
- In **Land Regions** under **Komatiite** and **Phonolite**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.geology.soapstone.pag:
**Soapstone** is a **Metamorphic** rock found as veins in other **Metamorphic** rocks. \
This can make it relatively rare.
book.modpack.guide.geology.suevite.name: Suevite
book.modpack.guide.geology.suevite.page1:
**Suevite** is a **Metamorphic** rock found as meteors found near the surface. \
This can make it relatively rare.
This means it is found alongside **Meteoric Iron**
book.modpack.guide.geology.travertine.pa:
**Travertine** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
- Deep, deep underground.
book.modpack.guide.geology.tuff.name: Tuff
book.modpack.guide.geology.tuff.page1.te:
**Tuff** is a **Sedimentary** rock. It can be found:
- In **Land Regions**.
- In **Uplift Regions**.
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.axe.p: **Axes** are required to chop down trees and mine logs, if you mine the bottom of a tree the rest of it will fall. Stone axes are less efficient at logging than metal ones.
An axe being knapped out of **Shale** rock.
**Clay** is an useful material that can be used for **Pottery**, and **Daub**.

Once you have clay, you can **Knap** the clay into unfired ceramics. 
\
\
To do so, you need to have five or more clay balls in your hand and **Right Click** in the air.

Clay Knapping GUI. 
 \
 \
 Tip: The "Clay Knapping" category in EMI shows everything you can make by knapping clay!

To fire ceramics in the early game, you need to make a **Pit Kiln**. 
\
\
You can make various ceramics such as **Vessels**, **Jugs**, and **Molds**.
You will need to create fire to ignite **Fire Pits**, **Pit Kilns**, and **Charcoal Forges**.
 \
 \
 The earliest way to makes fires are the **Firestarters**, hold **Right Click** for 5 seconds while holding them and pointing at a block.
**Firestarters** are a very cheap way to create fire.
To make a **Fire Pit**: drop 1 log, 3 sticks and 0-5 kindling items (like straw) on the ground. Then set fire to it with something like the firestarters.

Fire Pits can cook items, useful for cooking raw meat and vegetables. It can be reignited with a firestarter.
\
\
You can insert logs as fuel in the GUI and by **Right Clicking** the **Fire Pit** with the log in your hand.
Logs, raw and cooked items go in the slots as shown.
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.hoe.p:
**Knives** are fast at harvesting wild crops, leaves and can till dirt into farmland. 
 \
 \
 They also allow you to gain straw from breaking grass and let you pick up flowers and other foliage.
This shows a hoe being knapped out of **Claystone** rock.
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.intro: The first step in a new world to is pick up the the sticks and stones on the ground around you. You can **Right Click** on them or break them to collect them.
A Scattering of various rocks and twigs.

Once you have sticks and stones, you can **Knap** the stones together to shape them into another item. 
\
\
To do so, you need to have two or more rocks in your hand and **Right Click** in the air.

Rock Knapping GUI. 
 \
 \
 Tip: The "Rock Knapping" category in EMI shows everything you can make by knapping stones!

To shape the rock, **Left Click** (You can also hold) to remove the "tiles" to remove them. Until you create the desired shape.
 \
 \
 This will start the crafting process and use up one of your rocks.
An axe being knapped out of shale rock.

To craft the stone tool itself, you can craft it with a stick like such.
 \
 \
 Tools from different rock categories have slightly different durabilities.
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.javel: **Javelins** are a ranged weapon that can be thrown at opponents. They are decent at defending against predators from a distance.
This shows a javelin being knapped out of **Dacite** rock.
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.knife: **Knives** are fast at harvesting wild crops, leaves and allow you to gain straw from breaking grass. As well as letting you pick up flowers and other foliage.
This shows a knife being knapped out of **Phyllite** rock.
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.name: Getting Started
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.pit_k:
**Pit Kilns** create temperatures capable of firing pottery and melting metals.
 \
 \
 To create them, create a pit surrounded by blocks, use **V** to place items in the pit and **Right Click** 8 Straw and 8 Logs on the placed items.
Light the pit kiln to start it. (It Takes 8 minutes).
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.shove: **Shovels** make it much faster to mine dirt, grass, sand, gravel and clay.
This shows a shovel being knapped out of **Andesite** rock.
book.modpack.guide.getting_started.straw:
**Straw** is an item acquired by breaking grasses with a **Knife**.
 \
 \
 It can be used for **Pit Kilns** and **Thatch**
Crafting recipe to make thatch blocks.
book.modpack.guide.name: Guide To This World
book.modpack.guide.ores.amethyst.name: Amethyst
book.modpack.guide.ores.amethyst.page1.t:
Amethyst is a decorative **Mineral** which can be used to make *Glass*.  
\
It can be found in **Sedimentary** and **Metamorphic** rock beneath rivers above y=40.
book.modpack.guide.ores.anthracite.name: Anthracite
book.modpack.guide.ores.anthracite.page1:
Anthracite is a type of high-grade **Coal** ore.  
\
It can be found in very large flat deposits anywhere in **Metamorphic** rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.bauxite.name: Bauxite
book.modpack.guide.ores.bauxite.page1.te:
Bauxite is a **Mineral** ore of kaolinite found as flat deposits near the surface, indicated by granite loose rocks.
\
It can be found in **Limestone**, **Dolomite**, **Chalk**, **Gneiss**, **Blueschist**, **Serpentine**, **Granite**, **Rhyolite** and **Basalt**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.bismuthinite.pag:
Bismuthinite is an ore of **Bismuth** metal.  
\
It can be found in **Sedimentary** rocks near the surface, or larger and richer veins in **Igneous Intrusive** rocks deep underground.
Bituminous Coal is a type of mid-grade **Coal** ore.  
\
It can be found in very large flat deposits near the surface in **Sedimentary** rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.borax.name: Borax
book.modpack.guide.ores.borax.page1.text:
Borax is a **Mineral** which can be ground in the **Quern** to produce **Flux**.  
\
It can be found in very large flat deposits near the surface in **Claystone**, **Limestone**, **Shale**, **Sandstone**, **Red Sandstone**, **Arkose**, **Travertine** and **Argillite**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.cassiterite.name: Cassiterite
book.modpack.guide.ores.cassiterite.page:
Cassiterite is an ore of **Tin** metal. 
 \
 It can be found in **Igneous Intrusive** rocks at high elevation, above y=80 in uplift regions or in dikes.
 \
 It can also be found in deposits in **Rivers**, which can be **Panned**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.cinnabar.name: Cinnabar
book.modpack.guide.ores.cinnabar.page1.t:
Cinnabar is a **Mineral** which can be ground in the **Quern** to obtain **Redstone Dust**.  
\
It can be found in veins deep underground, in **Quartzite**, **Granite**, **Phyllite**, **Schist**, **Blueschist** and **Serpentine**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.cryolite.name: Cryolite
book.modpack.guide.ores.cryolite.page1.t:
Cryolite is a **Mineral** which can be ground in the **Quern** to obtain **Redstone Dust**.  
\
It can be found in veins deep underground, in **Granite**, **Diorite**, **Blueschist**, **Peridotite** and **Komatiite**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.diamond.name: Diamond
book.modpack.guide.ores.diamond.page1.te:
Kimberlite is a decorative and priceless **Gemstone**.  
\
It appears in thin vertical ore formations called **Kimberlite Pipes** found in **Gabbro** which can be up to a hundred blocks tall.
It can be rarely found in hot springs.
book.modpack.guide.ores.emerald.name: Emerald
book.modpack.guide.ores.emerald.page1.te:
Emerald is a decorative **Gemstone**.  
\
It looks quite pretty, maybe if you could find someone else in this incredibly lonely world you could trade it with them...
It appears in thin vertical ore formations which can be up to a hundred blocks tall. It can be found in **Igneous Intrusive** rocks.
It can be rarely found in hot springs.
book.modpack.guide.ores.galena.name: Galena
book.modpack.guide.ores.galena.page1.tex:
Galena is an ore of **Lead** metal. It can be found primarily in **Igneous Intrusive** rocks
\
It can be found in smaller amounts in **Igneous Extrusive** rocks, and as well as in **Limestone**, **Dolomite** and **Blueschist**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.garnierite.name: Garnierite
book.modpack.guide.ores.garnierite.page1:
Garnierite is an ore of **Nickel** metal.  
\
It can be found at elevations below y=0. 
It can be found primarily in **Gabbro** deep underground. 
Smaller, rarer veins can also be found in any **Igneous Intrusive** rock.
book.modpack.guide.ores.graphite.name: Graphite
book.modpack.guide.ores.graphite.page1.t:
Graphite is a **Mineral** which is used in the construction of **Fire Clay**.  
\
It can be found in **Gneiss**, **Marble**, **Quartzite**, **Schist**, **Blueschist**, and **Serpentine** rocks, in elevations below y=60.
book.modpack.guide.ores.gypsum.name: Gypsum
book.modpack.guide.ores.gypsum.page1.tex:
Gypsum is a decorative **Mineral** which can be used to make **Plaster**.  
\
It can be found in very large flat deposits near the surface in **Sedimentary** rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.halite.name: Halite
book.modpack.guide.ores.halite.page1.tex:
Halite is a **Mineral** which can be ground in the **Quern** to make **Salt**, which is an important **Preservative**. 
 \
 It can be found in very large flat deposits near the surface in **Sedimentary** rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.hematite.name: Hematite
book.modpack.guide.ores.hematite.page1.t:
Hematite is an ore of **Iron** metal.  
\
It can be found in large veins in any **Igneous Extrusive** rocks near the surface.
book.modpack.guide.ores.kaolinite.name: Kaolinite
Kaolinite is a soft **Mineral** which is used in the construction of **Fire Clay**.  
\
It can be found spawning at high altitudes in **Plateaus**, **Old Mountains**, **Rolling Hills**, and **Highlands**, at a **Temperature** of at least 18°C, with a **Rainfall** of at least 300mm.
The **Blood Lily** flower grows on **Kaolin clay**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.lapis_lazuli.pag:
Lapis Lazuli is a decorative **Mineral** which can be used to make **Blue Dye**.  
\
It can be found in large, but sparse veins in **Limestone**, **Marble**, **Arkose**, **Sandstone** and **Red Sandstone** between y=-20 and y=80.
book.modpack.guide.ores.lignite.name: Lignite
book.modpack.guide.ores.lignite.page1.te:
"Lignite is a type of low-grade **Coal** ore.  
\
It can be found in very large flat deposits near the surface in **Sedimentary** rocks."
book.modpack.guide.ores.limonite.name: Limonite
book.modpack.guide.ores.limonite.page1.t:
Limonite is an ore of **Iron** metal.  
\
It can be found in large veins in any **Sedimentary** rocks near the surface.
book.modpack.guide.ores.magnetite.name: Magnetite
Magnetite is an ore of **Iron** metal.  
\
It can be found in large veins in any **Sedimentary** rocks near the surface.
book.modpack.guide.ores.malachite.name: Malachite
Malachite is an ore of **Copper** metal. 
\
It can be found primarily in *Marble* or **Limestone**, **Chalk**, and **Dolomite**.  
It can be found at most elevations, however deeper veins are often larger and richer.
book.modpack.guide.ores.meteoric_iron.pa:
Meteoric Iron is a very rare ore of **Iron** found it meteorites alongside **Suevite** rock. It can be refined into **Wrought Iron** with a **Copper** anvil. 
 \
 Meteors can generate anywhere near the surface, except for oceans and high up on mountains, they can generate in any rock type,
book.modpack.guide.ores.name: Ores
book.modpack.guide.ores.native_copper.pa:
Native Copper is an ore of **Copper** metal.  
\
It can be found in **Igneous Extrusive** rocks, at elevations above y=40. 
\
It can also be found in deposits in **Rivers**, which can be **Panned**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.native_gold.name: Native Gold
book.modpack.guide.ores.native_gold.page:
Native Gold is an ore of **Gold** metal.  
\
It can be found at elevations below y=70, but deeper veins are larger and richer.  
It can be found in **Igneous Extrusive** and **Igneous Intrusive** rocks.  
\
It can also be found in deposits in **Rivers**, which can be **Panned**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.native_silver.pa:
Native Silver is an ore of **Silver** metal. 
\
Small poor veins can be found in **Granite** or **Diorite** in uplift regions, above y=90.  
Larger and richer veins can be found in **Granite**, **Diorite**, **Schist**, **Peridotite** and **Gneiss** deep underground below y=20.  
\
It can also be found in deposits in **Rivers**, which can be **Panned**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.opal.name: Opal
book.modpack.guide.ores.opal.page1.text:
Opal is a decorative **Gemstone**.  
\
It can be found in **Sedimentary** and **Igneous Extrusive** rock beneath rivers above y=40.
book.modpack.guide.ores.opal.page1.title: Opal
book.modpack.guide.ores.opal.page2.title: Opal
book.modpack.guide.ores.pyrite.name: Pyrite
book.modpack.guide.ores.pyrite.page1.tex:
Topaz is a decorative **Mineral**.  
\
It can be found in **Igneous Extrusive** and **Igneous Intrusive** rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.quartz.name: Quartz
book.modpack.guide.ores.quartz.page1.tex:
Quartz is a **Mineral** which can be found in pipe formations, it has various practical and aesthetic purposes. 
 \
 Poor quartz veins can generate in any **Sedimentary** rock, they are large but sparse. 
 \
 Richer veins can be found in **Granite**, **Rhyolite**, **Dacite**, **Quartzite** and **Schist**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.ruby.name: Ruby
book.modpack.guide.ores.ruby.page1.text:
Ruby is a decorative **Gemstone**.  
\
It can be found in **Schist** and **Gneiss** rock below y=-10.
book.modpack.guide.ores.ruby.page1.title: Ruby
book.modpack.guide.ores.ruby.page2.title: Ruby
book.modpack.guide.ores.saltpeter.name: Saltpeter
Saltpeter is a **Mineral** which can be ground in the **Quern**, and then used in the crafting of **Gunpowder**.  
\
It can be found in very large flat deposits near the surface in **Sedimentary** rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.sapphire.name: Sapphire
book.modpack.guide.ores.sapphire.page1.t:
Sapphire is a decorative **Gemstone**.  
\
It can be found in **Hot Springs** in **Metamorphic**, **Igneous Intrusive** and **Igneous Extrusive** Rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.sphalerite.name: Sphalerite
book.modpack.guide.ores.sphalerite.page1:
Sphalerite is an ore of **Zinc** metal.  
\
Small, poor veins can be found in **Igneous Extrusive** rocks near the surface, and large richer veins can be found in **Igneous Intrusive** rocks deep underground.
book.modpack.guide.ores.sulfur.name: Sulfur
book.modpack.guide.ores.sulfur.page1.tex:
Sulfur is a **Mineral** which can be ground in the **Quern**, and then used in the crafting of **Gunpowder**.  
\
It is found near lava level deep underground, in sparse but large and plentiful veins, in any **Metamorphic** or **Igneous Intrusive** rock.
book.modpack.guide.ores.sylvite.name: Sylvite
book.modpack.guide.ores.sylvite.page1.te:
Sylvite is a **Mineral** which can be ground in the **Quern**, and then used as a **Fertilizer**.  
\
It can be found in very large flat deposits near the surface in **Shale**, **Claystone**, **Chert**, **Sandstone**, **Red Sandstone**, **Arkose**, **Travertine** and **Argillite**.
book.modpack.guide.ores.tetrahedrite.pag:
Tetrahedrite is an ore of **Copper** metal.  
\
It can be found at any elevation, but deeper veins are often richer.  
It can be found in **Metamorphic** rocks.
book.modpack.guide.ores.topaz.name: Topaz
book.modpack.guide.ores.topaz.page1.text:
Topaz is a decorative **Mineral**.  
\
It can be found in **Sedimentary** and **Igneous Extrusive** rock beneath rivers above y=40.
book.modpack.guide.tooltip: Helping you, one page at a time!
